name: House Mimolot

street_level_faction_presence.street_signals: Symbols, uniform cues, work marks, and rumor shorthand make power visible in daily movement.

greetings: Scholarly acknowledgment, titles, and affiliation markers matter.
hospitality_rules: Visitors are often welcomed through procedure: sign-in, sponsorship, reading access, then actual warmth.
insult_triggers: attempting to bypass tariff or catalog rules
taboo_topics: public dismissal of education as wasteful
class_expectations: nobles, tutors, and apprentices are judged by composure, curiosity, and disciplined handling of knowledge
faith_etiquette: quiet contemplation and respect for study spaces matter more than visible zeal
suspicious_behavior: appearing in archive spaces without proper chain of access
outsider_mistakes: assuming scholarship is neutral rather than political and revenue-linked

occupation_and_daily_life.daily_rhythm: Instruction, copying, catalog review, tariff administration, debate, and magical training dominate the rhythm of Mimolot life.
occupation_and_daily_life.work_rhythm_by_calendar_or_season: Academic cycles and tariff surges shape movement, hiring, and public tension.
occupation_and_daily_life.ordinary_texture: The texture is quieter: paper dust, lamp oil, polished desks, muttered debate, and courier traffic carrying sealed packets.

travel_and_transition_texture: Travelers bound for Mimolot increasingly encounter archive rules, sponsorship expectations, and scrutiny over what they carry and copy.
dwelling_and_settlement_life: Households keep reading desks, small shrines or reflection corners, secured shelves, and class-marked guest etiquette.
relationship_and_reputation_logic: People are remembered for citation discipline, discretion, and whether they use learning to clarify or manipulate.
region_specific_emotional_tone: Mimolot stories naturally become dramas of study, ambition, secrecy, intellectual gatekeeping, and dangerous curiosity.
